name: Samsung Galaxy Watch 7
introText: The Samsung Galaxy Watch 7 is the best smartwatch for Android users — a 1.3-inch Super AMOLED with ECG, blood glucose tracking, and 30-hour battery life for $349 CAD.

specs.Health: BioActive sensor + ECG + blood glucose monitoring + sleep tracking

whatWorks: Blood glucose trend monitoring is Samsung's breakthrough feature — non-invasive glucose tracking (trend, not absolute measurement) gives diabetics and health-focused users insight no Apple Watch offers.
ECG + Samsung Health Monitor app enables AFib detection — health monitoring comparable to Apple Watch at $200 less for Android users who don't need iPhone integration.
worthKnowing: Best experience on Samsung Galaxy phones — full integration of Samsung Health, Galaxy AI, and phone link features requires a Samsung phone. Works with non-Samsung Android but with reduced functionality.
Blood glucose tracking is trend-only, not medical-grade — not approved for medical diagnosis; designed for lifestyle awareness, not diabetes management.

commonComplaints.title: Best features require Samsung phone
commonComplaints.body: Galaxy AI health insights and Samsung DeX features are limited or unavailable with non-Samsung Android phones. Pixel and OnePlus users miss key features.

commonComplaints.title: 30-hour battery requires daily charging
commonComplaints.body: 30 hours means charging every day for users who track sleep and workouts. Shorter than Garmin alternatives by a factor of 10.

commonComplaints.title: Wear OS has fewer watch apps than Apple Watch
commonComplaints.body: The Galaxy Watch runs Wear OS; the app ecosystem is smaller than Apple Watch's watchOS. Some niche fitness apps are iOS/Apple Watch only.

verdict: The Samsung Galaxy Watch 7 is the best Android smartwatch — especially for Samsung phone users who get full Galaxy ecosystem integration. ECG, blood glucose trends, and 30-hour battery make it a comprehensive health tracker. For Android users who don't own a Samsung phone, the Garmin Venu 3's platform-agnostic compatibility and 14-day battery make it a stronger alternative.

realBuyers.quote: Galaxy S25 + Galaxy Watch 7 is a perfect pair. Health data syncs automatically, phone calls through the watch, everything connected.
ECG caught an irregular reading that my doctor confirmed. Bought it as a toy, it's turned into a health device.
Blood glucose trend tracking is genuinely useful for understanding how food affects my energy levels.

metaDescription: Samsung Galaxy Watch 7 review Canada: ECG, blood glucose trend, Super AMOLED, 30-hr battery. $349 CAD. Best Android smartwatch for Canadian Galaxy users.
